---
title: "Research"
subtitle: "Health financing, primary care, and chronic disease systems"
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<div class="research-page">
  <section class="research-hero-panel">
    <div class="research-hero-copy">
      <span class="section-eyebrow">Research</span>
      <p class="research-pretitle">Health financing · Primary care · Chronic disease systems</p>
      <h1 class="research-headline">Studying what happens when clinics are expected to deliver chronic care without enough financial decision space to keep it running.</h1>
      <p class="research-intro">My first-author paper on hypertension and diabetes care in rural Kisumu is forthcoming in <em>BMC Public Health</em>. Across my work, I focus on the institutional details that shape outcomes on the ground: budgets, approvals, reimbursement flows, facility autonomy, and the hidden mechanics behind service continuity.</p>
      <div class="research-actions">
        <a href="thesis.html" class="btn-solid">View thesis</a>
        <a href="publications_files/01_NCDFin_ManuscriptV4.pdf" class="btn-ghost" target="_blank">Read manuscript PDF</a>
        <a href="../posts/47-facility-decision-space-chronic-care/index.html" class="btn-ghost">Read essay</a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="research-hero-side">
      <article class="research-publication-panel">
        <p class="research-kicker">Forthcoming in BMC Public Health</p>
        <h2>Financial Determinants of Effective Hypertension and Diabetes Care in Rural Primary Health Facilities in Kisumu, Kenya</h2>
        <p class="research-panel-copy">A mixed-methods study of seven public primary care facilities in Seme Sub-County showing how narrow funding streams, delayed approvals, and missing protected NCD budgets undermine continuity of care.</p>

        <div class="research-panel-stats">
          <div class="research-panel-stat">
            <strong>7</strong>
            <span>public facilities studied</span>
          </div>
          <div class="research-panel-stat">
            <strong>85.7%</strong>
            <span>reported frequent stockouts</span>
          </div>
          <div class="research-panel-stat">
            <strong>0%</strong>
            <span>had full spending autonomy</span>
          </div>
          <div class="research-panel-stat">
            <strong>BMC</strong>
            <span>journal destination</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </article>
    </div>
  </section>
  <section class="research-dossier-grid">
    <article class="research-dossier-card">
      <p class="research-kicker">Publication focus</p>
      <h3>What the paper shows</h3>
      <ul>
        <li>Chronic-care breakdown in rural primary care is often a governance problem, not only a procurement problem.</li>
        <li>Facilities can plan, budget, and still fail to sustain care if financial authority remains too far from the point of service.</li>
        <li>Protected NCD budgets and faster local execution matter as much as funding volume.</li>
      </ul>
    </article>

    <article class="research-dossier-card">
      <p class="research-kicker">Methods</p>
      <h3>How I work</h3>
      <p>I use mixed-methods designs that connect financial records, structured facility data, and management interviews so the analysis stays close to operational reality.</p>
      <div class="research-chip-row">
        <span class="research-chip">Mixed methods</span>
        <span class="research-chip">Health systems</span>
        <span class="research-chip">Facility finance</span>
        <span class="research-chip">Policy translation</span>
        <span class="research-chip">R</span>
        <span class="research-chip">STATA</span>
      </div>
    </article>
  </section>
</div>
```

## Research interests

```{=html}
<div class="research-interest-mosaic">
  <article class="research-interest-tile">
    <h4>Health financing and decision space</h4>
    <p>How county rules, purchasing arrangements, and approval chains shape what frontline facilities can actually do.</p>
  </article>
  <article class="research-interest-tile">
    <h4>NCD care in primary health systems</h4>
    <p>Hypertension and diabetes care, medicine continuity, and the operational conditions required for chronic-care delivery.</p>
  </article>
  <article class="research-interest-tile">
    <h4>Mixed-methods health systems research</h4>
    <p>Combining records, interviews, and implementation context to explain not just what failed, but why it failed.</p>
  </article>
  <article class="research-interest-tile">
    <h4>Life-course diabetes epidemiology</h4>
    <p>Urbanization, work history, and the pathways through which diabetes risk accumulates and returns to rural settings.</p>
  </article>
  <article class="research-interest-tile">
    <h4>Community-delivered intervention design</h4>
    <p>Locally grounded support models for chronic disease management, lifestyle change, and implementation feasibility.</p>
  </article>
  <article class="research-interest-tile">
    <h4>Research data systems</h4>
    <p>Practical workflows for data capture, data quality, reproducibility, and research operations in real project environments.</p>
  </article>
</div>
```

## Selected publications and contributions

```{=html}
<div class="research-publication-stack">
  <article class="research-citation-card research-citation-featured">
    <p class="research-citation-meta">First author · Forthcoming</p>
    <h3 class="research-citation-title">Financial Determinants of Effective Hypertension and Diabetes Care in Rural Primary Health Facilities in Kisumu, Kenya: A Mixed-Methods Study</h3>
    <p class="research-citation-body">Forthcoming in <em>BMC Public Health</em>. Role: study design, mixed-methods analysis, interpretation, and writing.</p>
  </article>

  <article class="research-citation-card">
    <p class="research-citation-meta">Co-author</p>
    <h3 class="research-citation-title">Addressing priority gaps in access and quality of NCD services in primary care settings in rural Kenya: A participatory approach to intervention development</h3>
    <p class="research-citation-body">Role: conceptualization, data collection, management, analysis, and co-writing results and discussion.</p>
  </article>

  <article class="research-citation-card">
    <p class="research-citation-meta">Co-author</p>
    <h3 class="research-citation-title">Characteristics and mortality risk among esophageal cancer patients with varied HIV status seeking care in western Kenya: A 10-year analysis</h3>
    <p class="research-citation-body">Role: data management and analysis.</p>
  </article>

  <article class="research-citation-card">
    <p class="research-citation-meta">Co-author</p>
    <h3 class="research-citation-title">Survival disparities in cervical cancer patients with and without HIV at Jaramogi Oginga Odinga Teaching and Referral Hospital</h3>
    <p class="research-citation-body">Role: data management and analysis.</p>
  </article>
</div>
```

## Collaboration

```{=html}
<div class="research-collab-card">
  <p>I am interested in collaborations on health systems research, chronic disease management, mixed-methods implementation studies, research data systems, and public-health analytics in Africa.</p>
  <div class="research-actions">
    <a href="mailto:nichodemuswerre@gmail.com" class="btn-solid">Email me</a>
    <a href="thesis.html" class="btn-ghost">View thesis</a>
  </div>
</div>
```
